rationale: In the citing paper, Corstjens and Lal (2000) appears as a single supporting citation in the limitations/future-research discussion, where the authors note that private-label quality can be used for retailer differentiation. The cited work is not used to build the main hypotheses, model specification, estimation approach, or core interpretation of results. The paper's central framework is driven by context-effects theory rather than by the store-loyalty mechanism from Corstjens and Lal.
